Colour reference

colour-reference.Rmd

Circadia Colour Reference

Complete palette reference for the Circadia Lab R ecosystem

Qualitative palettes

main — 8 colours
deep blue #014370
coral red #FC544A
amber #FFA75D
ochre #C8860A
antique white #FFECD4
mid blue #1B6799
steel blue #4A9BBF
pale teal #9BDFE2
core — 5 colours
deep blue #014370
coral red #FC544A
amber #FFA75D
ochre #C8860A
antique white #FFECD4

Diverging palettes

diverging
complex · 9 stops · multi-hue
diverging_simple
simple · 7 stops · direct interpolation

Sequential palettes

complex — multi-hue
blues
deep blue → pale teal
warm
coral → antique white
simple — monochromatic shades
seq_blue
monochromatic blue
seq_coral
monochromatic coral
seq_amber
monochromatic amber
seq_ochre
monochromatic ochre

Domain colours

Actigraphy
#014370
actigraphy
domain_colour_for("actigraphy")
Sleep
#1B6799
sleep
domain_colour_for("sleep")
Circadian
#9BDFE2
circadian
domain_colour_for("circadian")
Questionnaire
#FFA75D
questionnaire
domain_colour_for("questionnaire")
Demographics
#FFECD4
demographics
domain_colour_for("demographics")
Clinical
#FC544A
clinical
domain_colour_for("clinical")
Light
#C8860A
light
domain_colour_for("light")
Activity
#4A9BBF
activity
domain_colour_for("activity")

Click any swatch or gradient strip to copy the hex code to your clipboard.
